# okf-agents

> okf-agents is a Python library that turns Open Knowledge Format (OKF) Markdown bundles into LangGraph and LangChain building blocks: deterministic bundle loading, agent tools, a keyword retriever, a graph-aware semantic retriever, a query router, and a bounded navigator subgraph.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/README.md): Install, quick start, and usage examples.
- [Concepts](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/docs/concepts.md): Concept IDs, optional indexes, broken links, and lexical weighting.
- [API reference](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/docs/api-reference.md): Every public class and function with behavior contracts.
- [Navigator and budgets](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/docs/navigator-and-budgets.md): Traversal strategies and hop/concept/token budget enforcement.
- [Vector stores](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/docs/vector-stores.md): Store requirements, idempotent sync, and graph-aware retrieval.
- [Testing](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/docs/testing.md): Unit, integration, and e2e test tiers.

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/RonCodes88/okf-agents/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup and contribution workflow.
- [OKF specification](https://okf.md/spec/): The underlying Open Knowledge Format standard.
